descriptionShort: Abbott Cup western final game seven between Richmond Sockeyes and Humboldt Broncos, decided in overtime.
descriptionLong: Richmond Sockeyes and Humboldt Broncos met in game seven of the Abbott Cup junior-A western final on April 29, 1987, at Richmond Arena. Humboldt won 4-3 in overtime when Mike Gaber scored at 3:31 of the extra period. Coach Orland Kurtenbach criticized two key mistakes, including a Steve Jaques penalty that led to Humboldt's power-play goal. Richmond's scorers were Paul Rutherford (twice) and Dave Tomlinson.

attribution.headline: Abbott Cup Showdown Tonight for Sockeyes, Broncos
